lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੋ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਨੇ ਸੁੰਨ ਰਹਿਆ ਲਿਵ ਸੋਈ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: kahu kabeer jo naam samaane sun rahiaa liv soee |4|4|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, whoever is absorbed in the Naam remains lovingly absorbed in the Primal, Absolute Lord. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਤੁਮੑ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਤ ਹਉ ਤਉ ਤੁਮ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਬਤਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: jau tuma mo kau door karat hau tau tum mukat bataavahu |
lines.english: If You keep me far away from You, then tell me, what is liberation?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਅਨੇਕ ਹੋਇ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਗਲ ਮਹਿ ਅਬ ਕੈਸੇ ਭਰਮਾਵਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ek anek hoe rahio sagal meh ab kaise bharamaavahu |1|
lines.english: The One has many forms, and is contained within all; how can I be fooled now? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਧਉ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਹਾ ਦੇਉ ਕੈਸੀ ਕਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਪਾਈ ਹੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sodhau mukat kahaa deo kaisee kar prasaad mohi paaee hai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Tell me where, and what sort of liberation shall You give me? By Your Grace, I have already obtained it. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਤਾਰਿ ਕਹਾਂ ਲੈ ਜਈ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: raam mo kau taar kahaan lai jee hai |
lines.english: O Lord, where will You take me, to save me?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਰਨ ਤਰਨੁ ਤਬੈ ਲਗੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਤਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: taaran taran tabai lag kaheeai jab lag tat na jaaniaa |
lines.english: People talk of salvation and being saved, as long as they do not understand the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਤਉ ਬਿਮਲ ਭਏ ਘਟ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥੨॥੫॥
lines.translit: ab tau bimal bhe ghatt hee meh keh kabeer man maaniaa |2|5|
lines.english: I have now become pure within my heart, says Kabeer, and my mind is pleased and appeased. ||2||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਗੜ ਕੋਟ ਕੀਏ ਕੰਚਨ ਕੇ ਛੋਡਿ ਗਇਆ ਸੋ ਰਾਵਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin garr kott kee kanchan ke chhodd geaa so raavan |1|
lines.english: Raawan made castles and fortresses of gold, but he had to abandon them when he left. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਜਮੁ ਆਇ ਕੇਸ ਤੇ ਪਕਰੈ ਤਹ ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਛਡਾਵਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jab jam aae kes te pakarai teh har ko naam chhaddaavan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: When Death comes and grabs you by the hair, then only the Name of the Lord will save you. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਹੇ ਕੀਜਤੁ ਹੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaahe keejat hai man bhaavan |
lines.english: Why do you act only to please your mind?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਅਕਾਲੁ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਕੀਨੑਾ ਇਹੁ ਪਰਪੰਚੁ ਬਧਾਵਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaal akaal khasam kaa keenaa ihu parapanch badhaavan |
lines.english: Death, and deathlessness are the creations of our Lord and Master; this show, this expanse, is only an entanglement.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਤੇ ਅੰਤੇ ਮੁਕਤੇ ਜਿਨੑ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਾਮ ਰਸਾਇਨੁ ॥੨॥੬॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer te ante mukate jina hiradai raam rasaaein |2|6|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, those who have the sublime essence of the Lord in their hearts - in the end, they are liberated. ||2||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਨੂ ਨਕਟੂ ਸ੍ਰਵਨੂ ਰਸਪਤਿ ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਕਹਿਆ ਨ ਮਾਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nainoo nakattoo sravanoo rasapat indree kahiaa na maanaa |1|
lines.english: The eyes, nose, ears, tongue and sensory organs of touch do not obey any order. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੀ ਗਾਵਾ ਜੀਉ ਧਰ ਮਹਤਉ ਬਸਹਿ ਪੰਚ ਕਿਰਸਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: dehee gaavaa jeeo dhar mahtau baseh panch kirasaanaa |
lines.english: The body is a village, and the soul is the owner and farmer; the five farm-hands live there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰੀ ਘਰੀ ਕਾ ਲੇਖਾ ਮਾਗੈ ਕਾਇਥੁ ਚੇਤੂ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gharee gharee kaa lekhaa maagai kaaeith chetoo naau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The accountants summoned Chitar and Gupat, the recording scribes of the conscious and the unconscious, to ask for an account of each and every moment. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਅਬ ਨ ਬਸਉ ਇਹ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa ab na bsau ih gaau |
lines.english: O father, now I shall not live in this village.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਕ੍ਰਿਸਾਨਵਾ ਭਾਗਿ ਗਏ ਲੈ ਬਾਧਿਓ ਜੀਉ ਦਰਬਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: panch krisaanavaa bhaag ge lai baadhio jeeo darabaaree |2|
lines.english: The five farm-hands shall then run away, and the bailiff shall arrest the soul. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਜਬ ਲੇਖਾ ਮਾਗੈ ਬਾਕੀ ਨਿਕਸੀ ਭਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: dharam raae jab lekhaa maagai baakee nikasee bhaaree |
lines.english: When the Righteous Judge of Dharma calls for my account, there shall be a very heavy balance against me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਕੀ ਬਾਰ ਬਖਸਿ ਬੰਦੇ ਕਉ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਭਉਜਲਿ ਫੇਰਾ ॥੩॥੭॥
lines.translit: ab kee baar bakhas bande kau bahur na bhaujal feraa |3|7|
lines.english: O Lord, please forgive Your slave now, in this life, so that he may not have to return again to this terrifying world-ocean. ||3||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੈ ਕਬੀਰੁ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਰੇ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਖੇਤ ਹੀ ਕਰਹੁ ਨਿਬੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kahai kabeer sunahu re santahu khet hee karahu niberaa |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, listen, O Saints: settle your accounts in this farm.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਮਾਰੂ ਬਾਣੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag maaroo baanee kabeer jeeo kee |
lines.english: Raag Maaroo, The Word Of Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਭਉ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਬੈਰਾਗੀਅੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: anbhau kinai na dekhiaa bairaageearre |
lines.english: No one has seen the Fearless Lord, O renunciate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹੁ ਹਦੂਰਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਤਾਂ ਭਉ ਪਵੈ ਬੈਰਾਗੀਅੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: sahu hadoor dekhai taan bhau pavai bairaageearre |
lines.english: If one sees the Presence of his Husband Lord near at hand, then he feels the Fear of God, O renunciate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਭੈ ਅਨਭਉ ਹੋਇ ਵਣਾਹੰਬੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin bhai anbhau hoe vanaahanbai |1|
lines.english: Without the Fear of God, how can the Fearless Lord be obtained? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਰਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਲੋਕੁ ਵਣਾਹੰਬੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: paakhandd rataa sabh lok vanaahanbai |3|
lines.english: The whole world is filled with hypocrisy. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਤ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਹੋਇ ਵਣਾਹੰਬੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hukamai boojhai ta nirbhau hoe vanaahanbai |2|
lines.english: If he realizes the Hukam of the Lord's Command, then he becomes fearless. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪਾਖੰਡੁ ਨ ਕੀਜਈ ਬੈਰਾਗੀਅੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: har paakhandd na keejee bairaageearre |
lines.english: Don't practice hypocrisy with the Lord, O renunciate!

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਪਾਸੁ ਨ ਛੋਡਈ ਬੈਰਾਗੀਅੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa paas na chhoddee bairaageearre |
lines.english: Thirst and desire do not just go away, O renunciate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਮਤਾ ਜਾਲਿਆ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਵਣਾਹੰਬੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: mamataa jaaliaa pindd vanaahanbai |4|
lines.english: The body is burning in the fire of worldly love and attachment. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਬੈਰਾਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਬੈਰਾਗੀਅੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bin bairaag na hovee bairaageearre |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, there can be no renunciation,

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿੰਤਾ ਜਾਲਿ ਤਨੁ ਜਾਲਿਆ ਬੈਰਾਗੀਅੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: chintaa jaal tan jaaliaa bairaageearre |
lines.english: Anxiety is burned, and the body is burned, O renunciate,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਮਨੁ ਮਿਰਤਕੁ ਹੋਇ ਵਣਾਹੰਬੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: je man miratak hoe vanaahanbai |5|
lines.english: only if one lets his mind become dead. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਬੈਰਾਗੀਅੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: karam hovai satigur milai bairaageearre |
lines.english: When God grants His Grace, one meets the True Guru, O renunciate,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਲੋਚੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ਵਣਾਹੰਬੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: je lochai sabh koe vanaahanbai |6|
lines.english: even though all the people may wish for it. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਪਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ਵਣਾਹੰਬੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sahaje paavai soe vanaahanbai |7|
lines.english: and automatically, intuitively finds that Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਇਕ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਬੈਰਾਗੀਅੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: kahu kabeer ik benatee bairaageearre |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, I offer this one prayer, O renunciate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋ ਕਉ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰਿ ਵਣਾਹੰਬੈ ॥੮॥੧॥੮॥
lines.translit: mo kau bhaujal paar utaar vanaahanbai |8|1|8|
lines.english: Carry me across the terrifying world-ocean. ||8||1||8||
